description_long: This is an ASUS laptop with a silver keyboard deck and a black display bezel. The screen is open and displays a wallpaper featuring a tall building viewed from below. The laptop lid is adorned with several colorful stickers, including cartoon characters and text-based designs, while the palm rest area also features stickers. The keyboard is a full QWERTY layout with a numeric keypad and a large touchpad. Multiple ports are visible along the left edge, including USB, HDMI, and audio jacks. The ASUS logo is prominently displayed on the center of the lid, surrounded by stickers.
description: ASUS laptop with a silver keyboard, black bezel, and multiple colorful stickers on the lid and palm rest. The screen is open and displays a building wallpaper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with a building wallpaper, silver keyboard, and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile, visible ports, and stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed lid, displaying the ASUS logo and several colorful stickers.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's profile and additional stickers on the palm rest.
attribute_brand_logo: ASUS logo is visible on the center of the lid, in white, with a stylized font.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a wallpaper image of a tall building.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and numeric keypad; standard English language keys are visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: Stickers are present on the top lid (three stickers: cartoon faces and text) and on the palm rest area near the trackpad (multiple stickers: cartoon graphics and text).
